# Harness-UI structure/nav shell — the stable-shell left-rail keeper-view nav (the unfiled #13448 cross-cutting sub)

## Context

#13448 (the graduated harness-UI-definition epic, ADR-0020 in full) explicitly requires that **"the cross-cutting structure/nav is its own sub"** — but that sub was **never filed**. #13448 defines the harness UI as a **B3-hybrid**: a **stable shell** (left-rail nav + Accounts + Fleet roster + settings) beside a **dockable QT work-area** (Chat + live panes + canvas), with keeper views (Welcome → Accounts → Fleet → Chat) selected from the left-rail nav.

Every keeper view + the FM module mount (#14632) plugs into this shell — but the shell doesn't exist, so the live app is the June-post-mortem debt: `Viewport.mjs` = a toolbar + a `dashboard.Container` hosting `Accounts` + a `FleetSettingsPanel` (`GridContainer` **data-table**). No left-rail nav, no Welcome, no keeper-view routing, and the Fleet is a data-grid instead of the card cockpit the design SSOT specifies. Operator escalation (2026-07-05): *"how do we get to the fleet manager?"* — there is no nav shell to get there through.

## Intended solution

The stable-shell left-rail nav (the B3-hybrid shell), idiomatically a `tab.Container` with a **left** tab-bar = the keeper-view nav rail, hosting:
- **Welcome** — transient first-open landing (earns the "wow", routes in); not a keeper.
- **Fleet** — the FM cockpit: the roster as **cards** (`FleetGrid` + `AgentCard` + `ActivityStream` + `HealthBar`) + start/stop/restart. **Not** a `GridContainer` table (the "no neo grid planned" correction).
- **Accounts** — the existing identity-setup keeper-view, reachable via the rail.
- **Chat** — prompt → live-pane (placeholder → the dockable work-area).

The FM module mount (#14632) resolves to the **Fleet keeper-view slot** in this shell (view-region per the B3-hybrid; pop-out rides the dockable work-area — resolves #14631's topology). SSOT conformance (#14805) skins it.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `apps/agentos` renders a stable-shell **left-rail nav** (`tab.Container`, left rail) with keeper-view destinations.
- [ ] **Fleet** keeper-view renders the **card cockpit** (`FleetGrid` + `ActivityStream` in the §01 two-zone layout) — not a data-table.
- [ ] **Accounts** reachable via the nav rail.
- [ ] A **Welcome** landing (transient first-open or default destination).
- [ ] Renders in the dev server with a **screenshot** beside the SSOT frame (the #14805 conformance gate).

## Related

Parent #13448 (this is its unfiled cross-cutting structure/nav sub) · #14560 (FM cockpit UI/UX — the Fleet keeper-view components) · #14631/#14632 (FM module topology/mount — resolves to the Fleet view-region in this shell) · #14805 (SSOT conformance) · the design SSOTs (`apps/agentos/design/*.html`).

Live latest-open sweep this turn (newest #14845); no equivalent shell/nav sub exists.

- 2026-07-05T11:51:06Z @neo-opus-vega referenced in commit `59fa95a` - "refactor(agentos): cockpit styling into the SCSS theme system — remove raw CSS, lazy-load per component (#14846)"
- 2026-07-05T12:11:15Z @neo-opus-vega referenced in commit `81d1120` - "refactor(agentos): scope each cockpit SCSS under one component-root selector for isolation (#14846)"
- 2026-07-05T15:31:21Z @neo-opus-vega referenced in commit `54bf12a` - "fix(agentos): finish CSS-authority migration to SCSS theme + update shell E2E contract for the keeper-view nav (#14846)"
- 2026-07-05T16:25:34Z @neo-opus-vega referenced in commit `bfc1b3d` - "fix(agentos): host the dashboard.Panel keeper-views in dashboard.Containers to restore the pop-out host (#14846)

The shell mounted FleetSettingsPanel + Accounts (both Neo.dashboard.Panel
subclasses) bare as tab items, dropping the dashboard.Container host the old
Viewport provided. That silently lost the detach-to-window (pop-out) capability
and broke the Neural Link WindowOps E2E contract, which asserts a
Neo.dashboard.Container exists as FleetSettingsPanel's parent and pops it out via
its popupUrl.

Wrap each dashboard.Panel keeper-view in its own dashboard.Container (faithful
port of the old popupUrl + sortGroup); the rail tab reads the wrapper's header.

Render-verified on the dev server: Control renders a real Neo.dashboard.Container
(neo-dashboard cls) with FleetSettingsPanel nested inside it (the parentId
contract) + Start/Stop/Restart intact; zero console errors; Fleet cockpit still
the boot default. Addresses the AgentOS side of the WindowOps host failure."
- 2026-07-05T17:14:03Z @tobiu referenced in commit `8ab2c8d` - "feat(agentos): harness-UI left-rail keeper-view shell + Fleet cockpit keeper-view (#14846) (#14847)

* refactor(agentos): cockpit styling into the SCSS theme system — remove raw CSS, lazy-load per component (#14846)

* refactor(agentos): scope each cockpit SCSS under one component-root selector for isolation (#14846)

* fix(agentos): finish CSS-authority migration to SCSS theme + update shell E2E contract for the keeper-view nav (#14846)

* fix(agentos): host the dashboard.Panel keeper-views in dashboard.Containers to restore the pop-out host (#14846)
